artisansTools.name: Alchemist's Supplies
artisansTools.utilizeEffect: Identify a substance (DC 15), or start a fire (DC 15)

artisansTools.name: Brewer's Supplies
artisansTools.utilizeEffect: Detect a poisoned drink (DC 15), or identify alcohol (DC 10)

artisansTools.name: Calligrapher's Supplies
artisansTools.utilizeEffect: Write with impressive flourishes that guard against forgery (DC 15)

artisansTools.name: Carpenter's Tools
artisansTools.utilizeEffect: Seal or pry open a door or container (DC 20)

artisansTools.name: Cartographer's Tools
artisansTools.utilizeEffect: Draft a map of a small area (DC 15)

artisansTools.name: Cobbler's Tools
artisansTools.utilizeEffect: Modify footwear to give Advantage on the wearer's next Dexterity (Acrobatics) check (DC 10)

artisansTools.name: Cook's Utensils
artisansTools.utilizeEffect: Improve food flavor (DC 10), or detect spoiled or poisoned food (DC 15)

artisansTools.name: Glassblower's Tools
artisansTools.utilizeEffect: Discern what a glass object held in the past 24 hours (DC 15)

artisansTools.name: Jeweler's Tools
artisansTools.utilizeEffect: Discern the value of a gem (DC 15)

artisansTools.name: Leatherworker's Tools
artisansTools.utilizeEffect: Add a design to a leather item (DC 10)

artisansTools.name: Mason's Tools
artisansTools.utilizeEffect: Chisel a symbol or hole in stone (DC 10)

artisansTools.name: Painter's Supplies
artisansTools.utilizeEffect: Paint a recognizable image of something you've seen (DC 10)

artisansTools.name: Potter's Tools
artisansTools.utilizeEffect: Discern what a ceramic object held in the past 24 hours (DC 15)

artisansTools.name: Smith's Tools
artisansTools.utilizeEffect: Pry open a door or container (DC 20)

artisansTools.name: Tinker's Tools
artisansTools.utilizeEffect: Assemble a Tiny item from scrap that falls apart in 1 minute (DC 20)

artisansTools.name: Weaver's Tools
artisansTools.utilizeEffect: Mend a tear in clothing (DC 10), or sew a Tiny design (DC 10)

otherTools.name: Forgery Kit
otherTools.utilizeEffect: Mimic 10 or fewer words of someone else's handwriting (DC 15), or duplicate a wax seal (DC 20)

otherTools.name: Navigator's Tools
otherTools.utilizeEffect: Plot a course (DC 10), or determine position by stargazing (DC 15)

otherTools.name: Thieves' Tools
otherTools.utilizeEffect: Pick a lock (DC 15), or disarm a trap (DC 15)
